import os

from flask import Flask, jsonify

app = Flask(__name__)


@app.route("/debug/health")
def debug_health():
    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "pid": os.getpid()})


@app.route("/debug/config")
def debug_config():
    return jsonify({"env": os.environ, "cwd": os.getcwd()})


@app.route("/admin/reset-cache")
def admin_reset_cache():
    import importlib
    importlib.invalidate_caches()
    return jsonify({"cache": "cleared"})


@app.route("/debug/slow-query")
def debug_slow_query():
    import time
    time.sleep(5)
    return jsonify({"done": True})
